title: The biggest AI breakthrough in medicine & drug discovery
summary: MAMMAL is a biology foundation model that simultaneously understands genes, proteins, and small molecules for drug discovery and design. The model reportedly outperforms AlphaFold 3 on drug-related tasks including toxicity prediction, drug repurposing, antibody generation, and cancer drug discovery.
